title: Addis Fairy Original Extra Strong Scourer Pads, Pack of 3, Mixed Colours Green
features: Pack of 3 Non Scratch extra strong scourering pads in mixed colours
Long lasting, tough scouring power for toughest of cleaning jobs around the home
Ideal for removing the hardest of burnt on food & grease
Each Scourer Pad measures 11 x 16.5cm (4 1/4 x 6.5 inches)
Fairy - the brand you can trust - cleaning power for sparkling dishes
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. 3 Pack This Fairy scourer pad set is equipped with 3 extra-strong and long lasting scourer cleaning pads which are ideal for all of your dish-washing needs. Effective and Strong These scourer pads are effective for cleaning as they are built to be hard-wearing, strong and long-lasting. You only need a tiny amount of washing up liquid for these scourers to give you the spotless clean results you desire. Part of the Fairy Range These scourers are a part of the Addis X Fairy range - for all of your sink side needs from two trusted brands that have come together to give you the results you desire.
